      // ============================================
      // STATE MANAGEMENT
      // ============================================
      let currentStep = 1;
      const totalSteps = Object.keys(SCHEMA).length;
      let formData = {};
      let validationErrors = {};
      let stepValidated = {};
      let aiValidationResults = {};

      // Initialize formData structure
      function initFormData() {
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          const stepKey = `step${i}`;
          const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
          formData[stepKey] = {};
          if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
            formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField] = [{}];
          } else {
            Object.keys(stepSchema.fields).forEach((fieldName) => {
              const field = stepSchema.fields[fieldName];
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] =
                field.default !== undefined ? String(field.default) : "";
            });
          }
        }
      }
      initFormData();
      // Load any previously saved data from localStorage
      loadFromStorage();

      // ============================================
      // VALIDATION TRACKER
      // Accumulates AI validation results per step
      // ============================================

      function loadValidationsFromStorage() {
        try {
          const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
          if (saved) aiValidationResults = JSON.parse(saved);
        } catch(e) {}
      }
      function saveValidationsToStorage() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY, JSON.stringify(aiValidationResults));
        } catch(e) {}
      }
      loadValidationsFromStorage();

      function renderValidationTracker() {
        const body = document.getElementById('validationTrackerBody');
        const badge = document.getElementById('vtBadge');
        if (!body || !badge) return;

        const validatedCount = Object.keys(aiValidationResults).length;
        badge.textContent = `${validatedCount}/${totalSteps}`;

        let html = '';
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          const key = `step${i}`;
          const result = aiValidationResults[key];
          const title = SCHEMA[key].title;
          let icon, statusClass, statusText, details = '';

          if (!result) {
            icon = '⏳';
            statusClass = 'pending';
            statusText = 'Pendente';
          } else if (result.hasCriticalErrors) {
            icon = '🔴';
            statusClass = 'error';
            statusText = 'Erro';
          } else if (result.hasWarnings) {
            icon = '🟡';
            statusClass = 'warning';
            statusText = 'Alerta';
          } else {
            icon = '✅';
            statusClass = 'ok';
            statusText = 'OK';
          }

          if (result) {
            // Extract key points from output (first few bullet points)
            const bullets = (result.output || '').match(/[•\-]\s*.+|🟢.+|🟡.+|🔴.+/g) || [];
            const topBullets = bullets.slice(0, 4);
            if (topBullets.length > 0) {
              details = '<ul>' + topBullets.map(b => `<li>${b.replace(/^[•\-]\s*/, '')}</li>`).join('') + '</ul>';
            }
            if (result.suggestions && result.suggestions.length > 0) {
              details += `<span class="vt-suggestions-count">${result.suggestions.length} sugestão(ões) aplicada(s)</span>`;
            }
          }

          html += `<div class="vt-step">
            <div class="vt-step-header">
              <span class="vt-step-icon">${icon}</span>
              <span class="vt-step-name">Etapa ${i}: ${title}</span>
              <span class="vt-step-status ${statusClass}">${statusText}</span>
            </div>
            ${details ? `<div class="vt-step-details">${details}</div>` : ''}
          </div>`;
        }
        body.innerHTML = html;
      }

      function initValidationTracker() {
        const toggle = document.getElementById('validationTrackerToggle');
        const tracker = document.getElementById('validationTracker');
        if (toggle && tracker) {
          toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
            tracker.classList.toggle('open');
          });
        }
        renderValidationTracker();
      }

      // ============================================
      // VALIDATION ENGINE (Zod-equivalent in vanilla JS)
      // Guarantees data integrity for all PLANILHA fields
      // ============================================
      function validateField(fieldSchema, value, fieldName) {
        const errors = [];
        const val =
          value === null || value === undefined ? "" : String(value).trim();

        // Required check
        if (fieldSchema.required && !val) {
          errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" é obrigatório.`);
          return errors;
        }

        // If not required and empty, skip further checks
        if (!val) return errors;

        // Type-specific validations
        switch (fieldSchema.type) {
          case "number": {
            const num = parseFloat(val);
            if (isNaN(num)) {
              errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser um número válido.`);
              break;
            }
            if (fieldSchema.min !== undefined && num < fieldSchema.min) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo: ${fieldSchema.min}. Valor: ${num}`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.max !== undefined && num > fieldSchema.max) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" máximo: ${fieldSchema.max}. Valor: ${num}`,
              );
            }
            // Modular step validation (critical for dimensions)
            if (
              fieldSchema.step &&
              fieldSchema.step !== 1 &&
              fieldSchema.step < 1
            ) {
              const base = fieldSchema.min || 0;
              const diff = Math.abs(num - base);
              const remainder = diff % fieldSchema.step;
              const epsilon = 0.001;
              if (
                remainder > epsilon &&
                Math.abs(remainder - fieldSchema.step) > epsilon
              ) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve seguir incrementos de ${fieldSchema.step}m a partir de ${base}m. Valor ${num} não é modular.`,
                );
              }
            }
            break;
          }
          case "text": {
            if (fieldSchema.minLength && val.length < fieldSchema.minLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo ${fieldSchema.minLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.maxLength && val.length > fieldSchema.maxLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" máximo ${fieldSchema.maxLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.pattern) {
              const regex = new RegExp(fieldSchema.pattern);
              if (!regex.test(val)) {
                errors.push(
                  fieldSchema.patternMsg ||
                    `"${fieldSchema.label}" formato inválido.`,
                );
              }
            }
            // Custom CPF/CNPJ validation
            if (fieldSchema.customValidation === 'cpfcnpj') {
              const digits = val.replace(/\D/g, '');
              if (digits.length > 0 && digits.length < 11) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" está incompleto. CPF tem 11 dígitos, CNPJ tem 14.`);
              } else if (digits.length === 11 && !validateCpf(digits)) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" — CPF inválido (dígitos verificadores não conferem).`);
              } else if (digits.length > 11 && digits.length < 14) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" está incompleto. CNPJ precisa de 14 dígitos.`);
              } else if (digits.length === 14 && !validateCnpj(digits)) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" — CNPJ inválido (dígitos verificadores não conferem).`);
              }
            }
            break;
          }
          case "textarea": {
            if (fieldSchema.minLength && val.length < fieldSchema.minLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo ${fieldSchema.minLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.maxLength && val.length > fieldSchema.maxLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" excede ${fieldSchema.maxLength} caracteres (atual: ${val.length}).`,
              );
            }
            break;
          }
          case "select": {
            if (
              fieldSchema.options &&
              fieldSchema.required &&
              !fieldSchema.options.includes(val)
            ) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" — "${val}" não é uma opção válida.`,
              );
            }
            break;
          }
          case "creatable": {
            // Creatable accepts custom values, only validate length
            if (fieldSchema.maxLength && val.length > fieldSchema.maxLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" excede ${fieldSchema.maxLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            // Custom modular validation for dimensions
            if (fieldSchema.customValidation === 'modular028') {
              const num = parseFloat(val);
              if (isNaN(num)) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser um número válido.`);
              } else if (num < 1.12) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo: 1.12m.`);
              } else {
                const diff = Math.round((num - 1.12) * 100);
                if (diff % 28 !== 0) {
                  // Find nearest valid
                  const lower = 1.12 + Math.floor(diff / 28) * 0.28;
                  const upper = lower + 0.28;
                  errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser modular (múltiplo de 0.28m a partir de 1.12m). Valores próximos: ${lower.toFixed(2)}m ou ${upper.toFixed(2)}m.`);
                }
              }
            }
            if (fieldSchema.customValidation === 'modular005') {
              const num = parseFloat(val);
              if (isNaN(num)) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser um número válido.`);
              } else if (num < 2.0 || num > 6.0) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve estar entre 2.00m e 6.00m.`);
              } else {
                const diff = Math.round((num - 2.0) * 100);
                if (diff % 5 !== 0) {
                  const lower = 2.0 + Math.floor(diff / 5) * 0.05;
                  const upper = lower + 0.05;
                  errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve seguir incrementos de 0.05m. Valores próximos: ${lower.toFixed(2)}m ou ${upper.toFixed(2)}m.`);
                }
              }
            }
            break;
          }
        }
        return errors;
      }

      // Sync all visible DOM fields to formData before validation
      // Prevents stale-state bugs where user changed a field but event didn't fire yet
      function syncFormFromDOM() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;
        const stepKey = `step${currentStep}`;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];

        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-field-name]").forEach((el) => {
          const fieldName = el.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          const arrayIdx = el.getAttribute("data-array-idx");
          const isCreatable = el.classList.contains("creatable-container");
          const isIbgeCidadeUf = el.classList.contains("ibge-cidade-uf-container");

          let val;
          if (isIbgeCidadeUf) {
            // Combined city/state — skip, handled by its own logic
            return;
          } else if (isCreatable) {
            const input = el.querySelector(".creatable-input");
            val = input ? input.value : '';
          } else {
            val = el.value;
          }

          if (val === undefined) return;

          if (arrayIdx !== null && arrayIdx !== undefined && arrayIdx !== '') {
            const idx = parseInt(arrayIdx);
            if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
              if (!formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]) {
                formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx] = {};
              }
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx][fieldName] = val;
            }
          } else {
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = val;
          }
        });
        saveToStorage();
      }

      function validateStep(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        const errors = {};
        let hasErrors = false;

        if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
          const items = formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField] || [];
          if (items.length < (stepSchema.arrayMin || 1)) {
            errors._array = [
              `Adicione pelo menos ${stepSchema.arrayMin || 1} ${stepSchema.arrayLabel.toLowerCase()}.`,
            ];
            hasErrors = true;
          }
          items.forEach((item, idx) => {
            Object.entries(stepSchema.arrayFields).forEach(
              ([fieldName, fieldSchema]) => {
                const fieldErrors = validateField(
                  fieldSchema,
                  item[fieldName],
                  fieldName,
                );
                if (fieldErrors.length > 0) {
                  const key = `${stepSchema.arrayField}[${idx}].${fieldName}`;
                  errors[key] = fieldErrors;
                  hasErrors = true;
                }
              },
            );
          });
        } else {
          Object.entries(stepSchema.fields).forEach(
            ([fieldName, fieldSchema]) => {
              const value = formData[stepKey][fieldName];
              const fieldErrors = validateField(fieldSchema, value, fieldName);
              if (fieldErrors.length > 0) {
                errors[fieldName] = fieldErrors;
                hasErrors = true;
              }
            },
          );
        }

        // Cross-field validation: luminárias vs área (step3)
        if (stepNum === 3) {
          const comp = parseFloat(formData.step3.comprimento) || 0;
          const larg = parseFloat(formData.step3.largura) || 0;
          const qtdLum = parseInt(formData.step3.qtd_luminarias) || 0;
          const iluminacao = formData.step3.iluminacao || '';
          if (comp > 0 && larg > 0 && qtdLum > 0 && !iluminacao.includes('Sem Iluminação')) {
            const area = comp * larg;
            const recomendado = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(area / 6));
            const maxRazoavel = Math.ceil(area / 3); // 1 a cada 3m² é o máximo aceitável
            if (qtdLum > maxRazoavel) {
              if (!errors.qtd_luminarias) errors.qtd_luminarias = [];
              errors.qtd_luminarias.push(`Quantidade excessiva para a área de ${area.toFixed(1)}m² (${comp}×${larg}). Máximo razoável: ${maxRazoavel}. Recomendado: ~${recomendado} luminária(s).`);
              hasErrors = true;
            } else if (qtdLum < Math.max(1, Math.floor(area / 15))) {
              // Very few lights for a large area — just a warning, not blocking
              if (!errors.qtd_luminarias) errors.qtd_luminarias = [];
              errors.qtd_luminarias.push(`Poucas luminárias para ${area.toFixed(1)}m². Recomendado: ~${recomendado}. Verifique se é intencional.`);
              // Note: not setting hasErrors = true here — it's a soft warning
            }
          }
        }

        validationErrors[stepKey] = errors;
        return !hasErrors;
      }

      // ============================================
      // AI VALIDATION - Uses unified AgentRag endpoint
      // wizardValidation: true → stateless analysis (not saved to DB)
      // ============================================
      async function aiValidateStep(stepNum) {
        const badge = document.getElementById("aiValidatingBadge");
        badge.classList.add("show");

        try {
          // Collect ALL data filled so far (accumulative)
          const dataToValidate = {};
          for (let i = 1; i <= stepNum; i++) {
            dataToValidate[`step${i}`] = formData[`step${i}`];
          }

          const payload = {
            wizardValidation: true,  // Flag: don't save to DB, just analyze
            chatInput: `[WIZARD_VALIDATION]\n\nEtapa Atual: ${stepNum}/${totalSteps} — ${SCHEMA["step" + stepNum].title}\n\nDados do Formulário (allData):\n${JSON.stringify(dataToValidate)}\n\nSchema da Etapa Atual (stepSchema):\n${JSON.stringify(getStepFieldsSummary(stepNum))}\n\nInstrução: Analise tecnicamente os dados da etapa ${stepNum} cruzando com todas as etapas anteriores. Retorne JSON com output e suggestions.`,
            sessionId: currentSessionId || generateSessionId(),
            currentStep: stepNum,
            stepName: SCHEMA[`step${stepNum}`].title,
            totalSteps: totalSteps,
            allData: dataToValidate,
            stepSchema: getStepFieldsSummary(stepNum),
          };

          const response = await fetch(AGENT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(payload),
          });

          if (!response.ok) {
            console.warn("AI validation endpoint returned:", response.status);
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ Etapa ${stepNum} validada localmente. (Validação IA indisponível)`,
              "system",
            );
            return { valid: true, hasCriticalErrors: false };
          }

          let result = await response.json();

          // Handle case where response is a string containing JSON
          let output = '';
          let suggestions = [];

          // The agent may return the JSON as a string in result.output
          if (typeof result === 'string') {
            try {
              result = JSON.parse(result);
            } catch (e) {
              output = result;
            }
          }

          // Try to extract structured response
          if (result.output) {
            // Check if output itself is a JSON string
            if (typeof result.output === 'string' && result.output.trim().startsWith('{')) {
              try {
                const parsed = JSON.parse(result.output);
                output = parsed.output || result.output;
                suggestions = parsed.suggestions || result.suggestions || [];
              } catch (e) {
                output = result.output;
                suggestions = result.suggestions || [];
              }
            } else {
              output = result.output;
              suggestions = result.suggestions || [];
            }
          } else if (result.message) {
            // Check if message contains JSON
            if (typeof result.message === 'string' && result.message.trim().startsWith('{')) {
              try {
                const parsed = JSON.parse(result.message);
                output = parsed.output || result.message;
                suggestions = parsed.suggestions || [];
              } catch (e) {
                output = result.message;
              }
            } else {
              output = result.message;
            }
          } else {
            output = "Etapa validada sem observações.";
          }

          // Clean output: remove wrapping code fences if AI returned ```json blocks
          output = output.replace(/^```json\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/i, '');
          // If output still looks like JSON, try to extract the markdown part
          if (output.trim().startsWith('{')) {
            try {
              const lastTry = JSON.parse(output);
              output = lastTry.output || output;
              suggestions = lastTry.suggestions || suggestions;
            } catch (e) { /* keep as-is */ }
          }

          // Detect severity levels
          // Only 🔴 emoji is the reliable critical error indicator from our prompt format.
          // Keywords alone cause false positives (e.g. "sem erros técnicos relevantes").
          const hasCriticalErrors = (() => {
            // Direct 🔴 emoji = always critical
            if (/🔴/.test(output)) return true;
            // Also check suggestions — if AI sent corrections, it's a problem
            if (suggestions && suggestions.length > 0) {
              // Only block if suggestions target real errors (have a reason mentioning error terms)
              const hasErrorSuggestion = suggestions.some(s => 
                /🔴|impossível|incoerente|proibido/i.test(s.reason || '')
              );
              if (hasErrorSuggestion) return true;
            }
            return false;
          })();
          const hasWarnings = /🟡/.test(output);

          aiValidationResults[`step${stepNum}`] = { output, suggestions, hasCriticalErrors, hasWarnings };
          saveValidationsToStorage();
          renderValidationTracker();

          // Display the AI validation output (rendered as markdown)
          addChatMessage(
            output,
            "ai-validation",
            hasCriticalErrors ? "has-errors" : hasWarnings ? "has-issues" : "",
          );

          // Process suggestions
          if (!suggestions || !Array.isArray(suggestions)) {
            suggestions = parseSuggestionsFromOutput(output);
          }
          if (suggestions && suggestions.length > 0) {
            renderFieldSuggestions(stepNum, suggestions);
          }

          return { valid: !hasCriticalErrors, hasCriticalErrors, hasWarnings, suggestions };
        } catch (error) {
          console.warn("AI validation failed:", error.message);
          addChatMessage(
            `✅ Etapa ${stepNum} validada localmente. (Servidor IA não respondeu)`,
            "system",
          );
          return { valid: true, hasCriticalErrors: false };
        } finally {
          badge.classList.remove("show");
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // AI INLINE SUGGESTIONS
      // ============================================

      /**
       * Parse suggestions from AI output text.
       * Agent may return structured JSON in result.suggestions OR
       * embed them in the text with pattern: [SUGESTÃO campo: "valor" — razão]
       */
      function parseSuggestionsFromOutput(output) {
        const suggestions = [];
        // Pattern: [SUGESTÃO field_name: "suggested_value" — reason]
        const regex = /\[SUGESTÃO\s+(\w+):\s*"([^"]+)"\s*(?:—|–|-)\s*([^\]]+)\]/gi;
        let match;
        while ((match = regex.exec(output)) !== null) {
          suggestions.push({
            field: match[1],
            value: match[2],
            reason: match[3].trim(),
          });
        }
        return suggestions;
      }

      /**
       * Render suggestion chips near the relevant form fields
       */
      function renderFieldSuggestions(stepNum, suggestions) {
        // Clear existing suggestions
        clearFieldSuggestions();

        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;

        suggestions.forEach(suggestion => {
          const { field, value, reason } = suggestion;
          // Find the form-group containing this field
          let targetEl = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${field}"]`);
          if (!targetEl) return;

          // Get the parent .form-group
          const formGroup = targetEl.closest('.form-group') || targetEl.parentElement;
          if (!formGroup) return;

          // Create suggestion component
          const suggestionEl = document.createElement('div');
          suggestionEl.className = 'ai-suggestion';
          suggestionEl.setAttribute('data-suggestion-field', field);
          suggestionEl.innerHTML = `
            <div class="ai-suggestion-icon">IA</div>
            <div class="ai-suggestion-body">
              <div class="ai-suggestion-label">Sugestão do Agente</div>
              <div class="ai-suggestion-value">${escapeHtml(value)}</div>
              ${reason ? `<div class="ai-suggestion-reason">${escapeHtml(reason)}</div>` : ''}
            </div>
            <div class="ai-suggestion-actions">
              <button class="ai-suggestion-btn accept" data-field="${field}" data-value="${escapeAttr(value)}" title="Aceitar sugestão">
                <i data-lucide="check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aceitar
              </button>
              <button class="ai-suggestion-btn reject" data-field="${field}" title="Recusar sugestão">
                <i data-lucide="x" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          `;

          formGroup.appendChild(suggestionEl);

          // Bind accept/reject events
          const acceptBtn = suggestionEl.querySelector('.ai-suggestion-btn.accept');
          const rejectBtn = suggestionEl.querySelector('.ai-suggestion-btn.reject');

          acceptBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            applySuggestion(stepKey, field, value, targetEl);
            suggestionEl.remove();
          });

          rejectBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            suggestionEl.style.animation = 'suggestionSlide 0.2s ease reverse';
            setTimeout(() => suggestionEl.remove(), 200);
          });
        });

        if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      }

      /**
       * Apply accepted suggestion value to the field
       */
      function applySuggestion(stepKey, fieldName, value, targetEl) {
        // Update formData
        const schema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        if (schema.isDynamic) {
          // For dynamic arrays — fieldName might be like "compartimentos[0].temperature"
          const arrMatch = fieldName.match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
          if (arrMatch) {
            const [, arrName, idx, subField] = arrMatch;
            if (formData[stepKey][arrName] && formData[stepKey][arrName][parseInt(idx)]) {
              formData[stepKey][arrName][parseInt(idx)][subField] = value;
            }
          }
        } else {
          formData[stepKey][fieldName] = value;
        }

        // Update the actual input element
        if (targetEl.classList.contains('creatable-container')) {
          const input = targetEl.querySelector('.creatable-input');
          if (input) input.value = value;
        } else if (targetEl.classList.contains('ibge-cidade-uf-container')) {
          // Handle combo field
          // value expected format: "Cidade/UF"
          formData[stepKey][fieldName] = value;
        } else if (targetEl.tagName === 'SELECT') {
          targetEl.value = value;
        } else if (targetEl.tagName === 'INPUT' || targetEl.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
          targetEl.value = value;
        }

        saveToStorage();

        // Flash effect to indicate change
        const formGroup = targetEl.closest('.form-group') || targetEl.parentElement;
        if (formGroup) {
          formGroup.style.transition = 'background 0.3s';
          formGroup.style.background = 'rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1)';
          setTimeout(() => { formGroup.style.background = ''; }, 1500);
        }
      }

      /**
       * Remove all existing suggestion components
       */
      function clearFieldSuggestions() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.ai-suggestion').forEach(el => el.remove());
      }

      function getStepFieldsSummary(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const schema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        if (schema.isDynamic) {
          return {
            type: "dynamic",
            arrayField: schema.arrayField,
            fieldsPerItem: Object.entries(schema.arrayFields).map(([k, v]) => ({
              name: k,
              label: v.label,
              type: v.type,
              required: v.required,
              tag: v.tag || null,
            })),
          };
        }
        return {
          type: "static",
          fields: Object.entries(schema.fields).map(([k, v]) => ({
            name: k,
            label: v.label,
            type: v.type,
            required: v.required,
            tag: v.tag || null,
          })),
        };
      }

      // ============================================
      // CLIENT AUTOCOMPLETE (Step 2)
      // ============================================
      let clientSearchTimeout = null;

      function bindClientAutocomplete(panel, stepKey) {
        const fields = ['razao_social', 'cnpj_cpf', 'contato_telefone'];
        fields.forEach(fieldName => {
          const inputEl = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${fieldName}"]`);
          if (!inputEl || inputEl.tagName === 'SELECT') return;

          // Create dropdown container
          const wrapper = inputEl.closest('.form-group');
          if (!wrapper) return;
          wrapper.style.position = 'relative';

          let dropdown = wrapper.querySelector('.client-suggest-dropdown');
          if (!dropdown) {
            dropdown = document.createElement('div');
            dropdown.className = 'client-suggest-dropdown';
            wrapper.appendChild(dropdown);
          }

          inputEl.addEventListener('input', () => {
            clearTimeout(clientSearchTimeout);
            const query = inputEl.value.trim();
            if (query.length < 3) { dropdown.classList.remove('open'); return; }
            clientSearchTimeout = setTimeout(() => searchClients(query, dropdown, panel, stepKey), 300);
          });

          inputEl.addEventListener('blur', () => {
            // Delay to allow click on dropdown
            setTimeout(() => dropdown.classList.remove('open'), 200);
          });
        });
      }

      async function searchClients(query, dropdown, panel, stepKey) {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_search_clients', { p_query: query });
          if (error || !data || data.length === 0) {
            dropdown.classList.remove('open');
            return;
          }
          dropdown.innerHTML = data.map(c => `
            <div class="client-suggest-item" data-client-id="${c.id}">
              <div class="client-name">${escapeHtml(c.razao_social || '')}</div>
              <div class="client-meta">
                ${c.cnpj_cpf ? escapeHtml(c.cnpj_cpf) + ' · ' : ''}${escapeHtml(c.cidade || '')}${c.estado ? '/' + escapeHtml(c.estado) : ''}${c.total_orcamentos > 0 ? ' · ' + c.total_orcamentos + ' orçamento(s)' : ''}
              </div>
            </div>
          `).join('');
          dropdown.classList.add('open');

          // Bind click on each item
          dropdown.querySelectorAll('.client-suggest-item').forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
              e.preventDefault(); // prevent blur
              const clientId = item.getAttribute('data-client-id');
              const client = data.find(c => c.id === clientId);
              if (client) fillClientData(client, panel, stepKey);
              dropdown.classList.remove('open');
            });
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Client search error:', e);
        }
      }

      async function fillClientData(clientSummary, panel, stepKey) {
        // Fetch full client detail
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_client_detail', { p_client_id: clientSummary.id });
          if (error || !data || data.length === 0) return;
          const c = data[0];

          // Map client fields to step2 fields
          const fieldMap = {
            razao_social: c.razao_social,
            cnpj_cpf: c.cnpj_cpf,
            inscricao_estadual: c.inscricao_estadual,
            contato_nome: c.contato_nome,
            contato_telefone: c.contato_telefone || c.telefone,
            contato_email: c.contato_email || c.email,
            endereco_entrega: c.endereco,
            cep: c.cep,
            cidade: c.cidade,
            estado: c.estado,
            dados_tecnicos_resumo: c.dados_tecnicos,
          };

          // Fill formData and DOM inputs
          Object.entries(fieldMap).forEach(([field, value]) => {
            if (!value) return;
            formData[stepKey][field] = value;
            const el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${field}"]`);
            if (el) {
              if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
                el.value = value;
              } else if (el.tagName === 'SELECT') {
                el.value = value;
              } else if (el.classList.contains('creatable-container')) {
                const inp = el.querySelector('.creatable-input');
                if (inp) inp.value = value;
              }
            }
          });

          // Handle cidade-uf compound field
          if (c.local_instalacao) {
            formData[stepKey]['local_instalacao_municipio'] = c.local_instalacao;
          }

          // Store client_id for submission
          formData._client_id = clientSummary.id;

          saveToStorage();

          // Visual feedback
          addChatMessage(`✅ Dados de **${c.razao_social}** preenchidos automaticamente.`, 'system');
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Fill client error:', e);
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // UI RENDERING
      // ============================================
      function renderStepIndicator() {
        const container = document.getElementById("stepIndicator");
        container.innerHTML = "";
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          if (i > 1) {
            const line = document.createElement("div");
            line.className =
              "step-line" + (stepValidated[`step${i - 1}`] ? " completed" : "");
            container.appendChild(line);
          }
          const dot = document.createElement("div");
          dot.className = "step-dot";
          if (i === currentStep) dot.classList.add("active");
          else if (stepValidated[`step${i}`]) dot.classList.add("completed");
          const errors = validationErrors[`step${i}`];
          if (
            errors &&
            Object.keys(errors).length > 0 &&
            !stepValidated[`step${i}`]
          ) {
            dot.classList.add("has-error");
          }
          dot.textContent = i;
          dot.title = SCHEMA[`step${i}`].title;
          dot.addEventListener("click", () => navigateToStep(i));
          container.appendChild(dot);
        }
      }

      function renderCurrentStep() {
        clearFieldSuggestions();
        const container = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        const stepKey = `step${currentStep}`;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];

        let html = `<div class="step-panel active">
        <div class="step-card">
          <div class="step-header">
            <h2>Etapa ${currentStep}: ${stepSchema.title}</h2>
            <p>${stepSchema.description}</p>
          </div>`;

        if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
          html += renderDynamicStep(stepKey, stepSchema);
        } else {
          html += `<div class="form-grid">`;
          Object.entries(stepSchema.fields).forEach(([fieldName, field]) => {
            html += renderField(fieldName, field, stepKey);
          });
          html += `</div>`;
        }

        html += `</div></div>`;
        container.innerHTML = html;

        // Bind events after render
        bindFieldEvents(stepKey, stepSchema);
        updateNavButtons();
        renderStepIndicator();
        if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      }

      function renderField(fieldName, field, stepKey, arrayIdx) {
        const isArray = arrayIdx !== undefined && arrayIdx !== null;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        const fullKey = isArray
          ? `${stepSchema.arrayField}[${arrayIdx}].${fieldName}`
          : fieldName;
        const dataAttr = isArray
          ? `data-array-idx="${arrayIdx}" data-field-name="${fieldName}"`
          : `data-field-name="${fieldName}"`;
        const value = isArray
          ? (formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][arrayIdx] || {})[
              fieldName
            ] || ""
          : formData[stepKey][fieldName] || "";
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        const fieldErrors = errors[fullKey] || [];
        const hasError = fieldErrors.length > 0;
        const isFullWidth = field.type === "textarea";

        let html = `<div class="form-group${isFullWidth ? " full-width" : ""}">`;
        html += `<label>
        ${field.required ? '<span class="required">*</span>' : ""}
        ${field.label}
        ${field.tag ? `<span class="field-tag">${field.tag}</span>` : ""}
      </label>`;

        switch (field.type) {
          case "text":
            html += `<input type="text" class="form-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
            ${dataAttr} value="${escapeAttr(value)}" 
            placeholder="${field.patternMsg || ""}" />`;
            break;

          case "number":
            html += `<input type="number" class="form-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
            ${dataAttr} value="${escapeAttr(value)}" 
            min="${field.min !== undefined ? field.min : ""}" 
            max="${field.max !== undefined ? field.max : ""}" 
            step="${field.step || "any"}" />`;
            break;

          case "textarea":
            html += `<textarea class="form-textarea${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
            ${dataAttr} rows="3" 
            maxlength="${field.maxLength || ""}">${escapeHtml(value)}</textarea>`;
            break;

          case "select":
            html += `<select class="form-select${hasError ? " error" : ""}" ${dataAttr}>
            <option value="">-- Selecione --</option>
            ${(field.options || [])
              .map(
                (opt) =>
                  `<option value="${escapeAttr(opt)}" ${opt === value ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(opt)}</option>`,
              )
              .join("")}
          </select>`;
            break;

          case "creatable":
            if (field.readOnly) {
              html += `<input type="text" class="form-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
              ${dataAttr} value="${escapeAttr(value)}" readonly 
              style="background: var(--bg-body); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.8;" />`;
            } else {
              html += `<div class="creatable-container" ${dataAttr}>
            <input type="text" class="creatable-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
              value="${escapeAttr(value)}" placeholder="Selecione ou digite..." 
              autocomplete="off" />
            <div class="creatable-chevron"><i data-lucide="chevron-down" style="width:14px;height:14px"></i></div>
            <div class="creatable-dropdown">
              ${(field.options || [])
                .map(
                  (opt) =>
                    `<div class="creatable-option${opt === value ? " selected" : ""}" data-value="${escapeAttr(opt)}">${escapeHtml(opt)}</div>`,
                )
                .join("")}
            </div>
          </div>`;
            }
            break;

          case "ibge-estado":
            html += `<select class="form-select ibge-estado-select${hasError ? " error" : ""}" ${dataAttr}>
            <option value="">-- Selecione o Estado --</option>
            ${ibgeEstados.map(e => `<option value="${e.sigla}" ${e.sigla === value ? "selected" : ""}>${e.sigla} — ${e.nome}</option>`).join("")}
          </select>`;
            break;

          case "ibge-cidade":
            html += `<select class="form-select ibge-cidade-select${hasError ? " error" : ""}" ${dataAttr}>
            <option value="">-- Selecione o Estado primeiro --</option>
          </select>`;
            break;

          case "ibge-cidade-uf":
            // Combined: state selector + city selector inline
            const ufVal = (value && value.includes('/')) ? value.split('/').pop().trim() : '';
            const cidVal = (value && value.includes('/')) ? value.split('/')[0].trim() : value;
            html += `<div class="ibge-cidade-uf-container" ${dataAttr}>
            <select class="form-select ibge-uf-sub${hasError ? " error" : ""}" data-sub="uf" style="flex:0 0 120px;">
              <option value="">UF</option>
              ${ibgeEstados.map(e => `<option value="${e.sigla}" ${e.sigla === ufVal ? "selected" : ""}>${e.sigla}</option>`).join("")}
            </select>
            <select class="form-select ibge-cidade-sub${hasError ? " error" : ""}" data-sub="cidade" style="flex:1;">
              <option value="">${ufVal ? '-- Selecione a Cidade --' : '-- Selecione o UF primeiro --'}</option>
            </select>
          </div>`;
            break;
        }

        if (field.hint) {
          html += `<span class="field-hint">${field.hint}</span>`;
        }
        html += `<span class="field-error${hasError ? " show" : ""}" data-error-for="${fullKey}">${fieldErrors.join(" ")}</span>`;
        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      function renderDynamicStep(stepKey, stepSchema) {
        const items = formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField] || [];
        let html = `<div class="array-section">
        <div class="array-header">
          <h4>${stepSchema.arrayLabel}s (${items.length}/${stepSchema.arrayMax})</h4>
          ${
            items.length < stepSchema.arrayMax
              ? `<button type="button" class="btn-add-item" id="addArrayItem">
              <i data-lucide="plus" style="width:14px;height:14px"></i> Adicionar ${stepSchema.arrayLabel}
            </button>`
              : ""
          }
        </div>`;

        items.forEach((item, idx) => {
          html += `<div class="array-item" data-index="${idx}">
          <div class="array-item-header">
            <span>${stepSchema.arrayLabel} #${idx + 1}</span>
            ${
              items.length > (stepSchema.arrayMin || 1)
                ? `<button type="button" class="btn-remove-item" data-remove-idx="${idx}">Remover</button>`
                : ""
            }
          </div>
          <div class="form-grid">`;
          Object.entries(stepSchema.arrayFields).forEach(
            ([fieldName, field]) => {
              html += renderField(fieldName, field, stepKey, idx);
            },
          );
          html += `</div></div>`;
        });

        // Array-level error
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        if (errors._array) {
          html += `<span class="field-error show">${errors._array.join(" ")}</span>`;
        }

        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      function bindFieldEvents(stepKey, stepSchema) {
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");

        // Get all elements with data-field-name
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-field-name]").forEach((el) => {
          const fieldName = el.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          const arrayIdx = el.getAttribute("data-array-idx");
          const isCreatable = el.classList.contains("creatable-container");
          const isIbgeCidadeUf = el.classList.contains("ibge-cidade-uf-container");

          // Skip special containers — handled separately below
          if (isIbgeCidadeUf) return;

          const inputEl = isCreatable
            ? el.querySelector(".creatable-input")
            : el;
          if (!inputEl) return;

          const updateValue = () => {
            const val = inputEl.value;
            if (
              arrayIdx !== null &&
              arrayIdx !== undefined &&
              arrayIdx !== ""
            ) {
              const idx = parseInt(arrayIdx);
              if (!formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]) {
                formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx] = {};
              }
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx][fieldName] = val;
            } else {
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = val;
            }
            saveToStorage();
          };

          inputEl.addEventListener("input", updateValue);
          inputEl.addEventListener("change", updateValue);

          // Creatable dropdown behavior
          if (isCreatable) {
            const dropdown = el.querySelector(".creatable-dropdown");
            const options = el.querySelectorAll(".creatable-option");

            inputEl.addEventListener("focus", () => {
              dropdown.classList.add("open");
              filterOptions(el);
            });

            inputEl.addEventListener("input", () => {
              dropdown.classList.add("open");
              filterOptions(el);
            });

            options.forEach((opt) => {
              opt.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
                e.preventDefault(); // Prevent blur before click registers
                inputEl.value = opt.getAttribute("data-value");
                updateValue();
                dropdown.classList.remove("open");
                // Update selected state
                options.forEach((o) => o.classList.remove("selected"));
                opt.classList.add("selected");
              });
            });

            inputEl.addEventListener("blur", () => {
              setTimeout(() => dropdown.classList.remove("open"), 150);
            });
          }
        });

        // ============================================
        // IBGE: Estado → Cidade dynamic loading
        // ============================================
        // Handle ibge-estado selects: when changed, populate the ibge-cidade in same step
        panel.querySelectorAll(".ibge-estado-select").forEach((estadoEl) => {
          const fieldName = estadoEl.getAttribute("data-field-name");

          // On change: update formData + load cities
          estadoEl.addEventListener("change", async () => {
            const uf = estadoEl.value;
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = uf;
            saveToStorage();

            // Find associated cidade select (dependsOn relationship)
            const cidadeSelect = panel.querySelector(".ibge-cidade-select");
            if (cidadeSelect) {
              cidadeSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Carregando cidades...</option>';
              if (uf) {
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(uf);
                const currentCidade = formData[stepKey][cidadeSelect.getAttribute("data-field-name")] || '';
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                  cidades.map(c => `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === currentCidade ? 'selected' : ''}>${c.nome}</option>`).join('');
              } else {
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Selecione o Estado primeiro --</option>';
              }
            }
          });

          // On initial load: if estado already has value, populate cidades
          const currentUf = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || '';
          if (currentUf) {
            const cidadeSelect = panel.querySelector(".ibge-cidade-select");
            if (cidadeSelect) {
              (async () => {
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Carregando cidades...</option>';
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(currentUf);
                const currentCidade = formData[stepKey][cidadeSelect.getAttribute("data-field-name")] || '';
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                  cidades.map(c => `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === currentCidade ? 'selected' : ''}>${c.nome}</option>`).join('');
              })();
            }
          }
        });

        // Handle ibge-cidade: update formData on change
        panel.querySelectorAll(".ibge-cidade-select").forEach((cidadeEl) => {
          const fieldName = cidadeEl.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          cidadeEl.addEventListener("change", () => {
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = cidadeEl.value;
            saveToStorage();
          });
        });

        // Handle ibge-cidade-uf (combined): two selects inside a container
        panel.querySelectorAll(".ibge-cidade-uf-container").forEach((container) => {
          const fieldName = container.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          const ufSelect = container.querySelector("[data-sub='uf']");
          const cidadeSelect = container.querySelector("[data-sub='cidade']");

          const updateCombinedValue = () => {
            const cidade = cidadeSelect.value;
            const uf = ufSelect.value;
            if (cidade && uf) {
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = `${cidade}/${uf}`;
            } else {
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = '';
            }
            saveToStorage();
          };

          // When UF changes, load cities
          ufSelect.addEventListener("change", async () => {
            const uf = ufSelect.value;
            cidadeSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Carregando...</option>';
            if (uf) {
              const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(uf);
              // Check if there's an existing saved value
              const savedVal = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || '';
              const savedCidade = savedVal.includes('/') ? savedVal.split('/')[0].trim() : '';
              cidadeSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                cidades.map(c => `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === savedCidade ? 'selected' : ''}>${c.nome}</option>`).join('');
            } else {
              cidadeSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Selecione o UF primeiro --</option>';
            }
            updateCombinedValue();
          });

          cidadeSelect.addEventListener("change", updateCombinedValue);

          // On initial load: if value exists, populate
          const currentVal = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || '';
          if (currentVal && currentVal.includes('/')) {
            const parts = currentVal.split('/');
            const savedUf = parts.pop().trim();
            const savedCidade = parts.join('/').trim();
            if (savedUf && ufSelect.value === savedUf) {
              (async () => {
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(savedUf);
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                  cidades.map(c => `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === savedCidade ? 'selected' : ''}>${c.nome}</option>`).join('');
              })();
            }
          }
        });

        // CLIENT AUTOCOMPLETE for step2 (razao_social and cnpj_cpf)
        if (stepKey === 'step2') {
          bindClientAutocomplete(panel, stepKey);
        }

        // CPF/CNPJ mask binding
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-field-name="cnpj_cpf"]').forEach((inputEl) => {
          inputEl.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            const cursorPos = e.target.selectionStart;
            const oldLen = e.target.value.length;
            e.target.value = maskCpfCnpj(e.target.value);
            const newLen = e.target.value.length;
            // Adjust cursor position after formatting
            const diff = newLen - oldLen;
            e.target.setSelectionRange(cursorPos + diff, cursorPos + diff);
            // Update formData
            const arrayIdx = inputEl.getAttribute('data-array-idx');
            if (arrayIdx !== null && arrayIdx !== undefined && arrayIdx !== '') {
              const idx = parseInt(arrayIdx);
              if (!formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]) formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx] = {};
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]['cnpj_cpf'] = e.target.value;
            } else {
              formData[stepKey]['cnpj_cpf'] = e.target.value;
            }
            saveToStorage();
          });
          // Validate on blur
          inputEl.addEventListener('blur', (e) => {
            const val = e.target.value;
            const digits = val.replace(/\D/g, '');
            if (digits.length === 0) return; // empty is handled by required validation
            if (digits.length < 11) {
              e.target.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-error)';
              e.target.title = 'CPF ou CNPJ incompleto';
            } else if (!validateCpfCnpj(val)) {
              e.target.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-error)';
              e.target.title = digits.length === 11 ? 'CPF inválido' : 'CNPJ inválido';
            } else {
              e.target.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-success)';
              e.target.title = digits.length === 11 ? 'CPF válido ✓' : 'CNPJ válido ✓';
            }
          });
          // Apply mask on initial render if value exists
          if (inputEl.value) {
            inputEl.value = maskCpfCnpj(inputEl.value);
          }
        });

        // Luminárias auto-suggest based on area (step3 only)
        if (stepKey === 'step3') {
          const suggestLuminarias = () => {
            const comp = parseFloat(formData.step3.comprimento) || 0;
            const larg = parseFloat(formData.step3.largura) || 0;
            const iluminacao = formData.step3.iluminacao || '';
            const lumInput = panel.querySelector('[data-field-name="qtd_luminarias"]');
            if (!lumInput || iluminacao.includes('Sem Iluminação')) return;

            if (comp > 0 && larg > 0) {
              const area = comp * larg;
              const recomendado = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(area / 6));
              // Only auto-fill if user hasn't manually set a value
              const currentVal = parseInt(lumInput.value) || 0;
              if (currentVal === 0 || currentVal === 1) {
                lumInput.value = recomendado;
                formData.step3.qtd_luminarias = String(recomendado);
                saveToStorage();
              }
              // Update hint dynamically
              const hintEl = lumInput.parentElement?.querySelector('.field-hint');
              if (hintEl) {
                hintEl.textContent = `Área: ${area.toFixed(1)}m² → Recomendado: ${recomendado} luminária(s) (~1 a cada 6m²). Máx razoável: ${Math.ceil(area / 3)}`;
              }
            }
          };

          // Listen for changes on comprimento and largura (creatable inputs)
          panel.querySelectorAll('[data-field-name="comprimento"] .creatable-input, [data-field-name="largura"] .creatable-input').forEach(input => {
            input.addEventListener('change', suggestLuminarias);
            input.addEventListener('blur', suggestLuminarias);
          });

          // Also listen for iluminacao changes
          const ilumSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-field-name="iluminacao"]');
          if (ilumSelect) {
            ilumSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
              const lumInput = panel.querySelector('[data-field-name="qtd_luminarias"]');
              if (!lumInput) return;
              if (ilumSelect.value.includes('Sem Iluminação')) {
                lumInput.value = '0';
                formData.step3.qtd_luminarias = '0';
                lumInput.disabled = true;
                lumInput.style.opacity = '0.5';
              } else {
                lumInput.disabled = false;
                lumInput.style.opacity = '1';
                suggestLuminarias();
              }
              saveToStorage();
            });
          }

          // Run suggest on render if dims already filled
          suggestLuminarias();
        }

        // Dynamic array: Add button
        if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
          const addBtn = document.getElementById("addArrayItem");
          if (addBtn) {
            addBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const items = formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField];
              if (items.length < stepSchema.arrayMax) {
                items.push({});
                saveToStorage();
                renderCurrentStep();
              }
            });
          }

          // Remove buttons
          panel.querySelectorAll("[data-remove-idx]").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-remove-idx"));
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField].splice(idx, 1);
              saveToStorage();
              renderCurrentStep();
            });
          });
        }
      }

      function filterOptions(container) {
        const input = container.querySelector(".creatable-input");
        const val = input.value.toLowerCase().trim();
        container.querySelectorAll(".creatable-option").forEach((opt) => {
          const text = (opt.getAttribute("data-value") || "").toLowerCase();
          if (!val || text.includes(val)) {
            opt.classList.remove("hidden");
          } else {
            opt.classList.add("hidden");
          }
        });
      }

      function updateNavButtons() {
        const prevBtn = document.getElementById("btnPrev");
        const nextBtn = document.getElementById("btnNext");

        prevBtn.style.visibility = currentStep === 1 ? "hidden" : "visible";

        if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
          nextBtn.innerHTML =
            '<i data-lucide="check" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i> Enviar Orçamento';
          nextBtn.classList.add("btn-submit-style");
        } else {
          nextBtn.innerHTML =
            'Próximo <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i>';
          nextBtn.classList.remove("btn-submit-style");
        }
        if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // ============================================
      // NAVIGATION LOGIC
      // ============================================
      function navigateToStep(targetStep) {
        if (targetStep === currentStep) return;
        if (targetStep < 1 || targetStep > totalSteps) return;

        // When going backwards, just go
        if (targetStep < currentStep) {
          currentStep = targetStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          return;
        }

        // Going forward: validate each intermediate step
        for (let i = currentStep; i < targetStep; i++) {
          const valid = validateStep(i);
          if (!valid) {
            currentStep = i;
            renderCurrentStep();
            showValidationErrorsInChat(i);
            return;
          }
          stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
        }

        currentStep = targetStep;
        renderCurrentStep();
        scrollWizardTop();
      }

      let isSubmitting = false; // Prevent double-click

      async function advanceStep() {
        // Sync DOM → formData before validating (prevents stale-state bugs)
        syncFormFromDOM();

        // Validate current step (local validation)
        const valid = validateStep(currentStep);
        if (!valid) {
          renderCurrentStep(); // Re-render with error styles
          showValidationErrorsInChat(currentStep);
          return;
        }

        stepValidated[`step${currentStep}`] = true;

        // Disable button while AI validates
        const btnNext = document.getElementById("btnNext");
        btnNext.disabled = true;
        btnNext.style.opacity = '0.6';

        // AI validation (BLOCKING if critical errors found)
        const aiResult = await aiValidateStep(currentStep);

        btnNext.disabled = false;
        btnNext.style.opacity = '1';

        // If AI found critical errors (🔴), BLOCK advancement
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          addChatMessage(
            '🚫 **Não é possível avançar.** A validação IA identificou problemas críticos (🔴) que precisam ser corrigidos antes de prosseguir. Revise os campos destacados acima.',
            'system',
          );
          return; // DO NOT advance
        }

        // Advance (OK or only warnings)
        if (currentStep < totalSteps) {
          currentStep++;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }

      function showValidationErrorsInChat(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        const allErrors = Object.values(errors).flat();
        if (allErrors.length > 0) {
          const msg = `⚠️ **Corrija os erros na Etapa ${stepNum}:**\n\n${allErrors.map((e) => `• ${e}`).join("\n")}`;
          addChatMessage(msg, "system");
        }
      }

      function scrollWizardTop() {
        document
          .querySelector(".wizard-area")
          .scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
      }

      // ============================================
      // SUBMIT WIZARD
      // ============================================
      async function submitWizard() {
        // Prevent double submissions
        if (isSubmitting) return;
        isSubmitting = true;

        // Sync current step DOM → formData before validating
        syncFormFromDOM();

        // Enforce representante for non-admin users (prevent DOM tampering)
        if (!isAdmin()) {
          const userName = currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || '';
          formData.step1.representante = userName;
        }

        const btnNext = document.getElementById("btnNext");
        btnNext.disabled = true;
        btnNext.style.opacity = '0.6';

        // Validate ALL steps locally before submitting
        let allValid = true;
        let firstErrorStep = null;

        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          if (!validateStep(i)) {
            allValid = false;
            if (!firstErrorStep) firstErrorStep = i;
          } else {
            stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
          }
        }

        if (!allValid) {
          currentStep = firstErrorStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          showValidationErrorsInChat(firstErrorStep);
          addChatMessage(
            "❌ Há erros pendentes em etapas anteriores. Corrija-os antes de enviar.",
            "system",
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          return;
        }

        // ====== AI VALIDATE STEP 6 BEFORE SUBMITTING ======
        const aiResult = await aiValidateStep(currentStep);
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          addChatMessage(
            '🚫 **Não é possível enviar.** A validação IA identificou problemas críticos (🔴) na Etapa 6 que precisam ser corrigidos antes do envio.',
            'system',
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          return;
        }

        // ====== SUBMIT TO BACKEND ======
        const badge = document.getElementById("aiValidatingBadge");
        badge.querySelector("span").textContent = "Enviando orçamento...";
        badge.classList.add("show");

        try {
          const response = await fetch(WIZARD_SUBMIT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              formData: formData,
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
              submittedBy: getUser(),
              userRole: getUserRole(),
              version: "1.0",
            }),
          });

          if (response.ok) {
            let result = {};
            try {
              result = await response.json();
            } catch (e) {}
            const protocol = result.protocol || '';
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ **Orçamento enviado com sucesso!**\n\n${protocol ? "📋 Protocolo: **" + protocol + "**\n\n" : ""}${result.message || 'Dados registrados.'}`,
              "ai-validation",
            );

            // ====== RESET WIZARD FOR NEW SUBMISSION ======
            setTimeout(() => {
              clearFormStorage();
              formData = {};
              validationErrors = {};
              stepValidated = {};
              aiValidationResults = {};
              localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
              currentStep = 1;
              initFormData();
              renderCurrentStep();
              renderValidationTracker();
              addChatMessage(
                `📝 **Novo orçamento iniciado.** O formulário foi limpo para um novo preenchimento.${protocol ? ' O protocolo anterior é: ' + protocol : ''}`,
                'system',
              );
            }, 2000); // Small delay so user can read the success message

          } else {
            const errText = await response.text().catch(() => "");
            addChatMessage(
              `❌ Falha ao enviar orçamento (${response.status}). ${errText || 'Servidor não retornou detalhes.'}`,
              "system",
            );
          }
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("Submit error:", error);
          addChatMessage(
            "❌ Erro de conexão ao enviar. Verifique sua rede e tente novamente.",
            "system",
          );
        } finally {
          badge.classList.remove("show");
          badge.querySelector("span").textContent = "IA analisando...";
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          isSubmitting = false;
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // CHAT FUNCTIONALITY
      // ============================================
      function stripChatContext(text) {
        if (!text) return text;
        // Remove [CONTEXTO DO WIZARD] and everything after it
        return text.replace(/\s*\[CONTEXTO[^\]]*\].*$/s, '').trim();
      }

      function addChatMessage(content, type = "assistant", extraClass = "") {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        content = stripChatContext(content);
        if (!content) return; // skip empty messages after stripping
        const msg = document.createElement("div");
        msg.className = `chat-msg ${type} ${extraClass}`.trim();

        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.className = "msg-content";
        div.innerHTML = marked.parse(content);
        msg.appendChild(div);

        chatMessages.appendChild(msg);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;

        // Auto-open chat if closed for important messages
        if (
          (type === "ai-validation" || type === "system") &&
          !document.getElementById("chatPanel").classList.contains("open")
        ) {
          toggleChat();
        }
      }

      async function sendChatMessage(message) {
        if (!message.trim()) return;
        addChatMessage(message, "user");

        // Ensure we have a session
        if (!currentSessionId) {
          currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        }

        // Show typing indicator
        showTypingIndicator();

        try {
          const response = await fetch(AGENT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              chatInput: message,
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              wizardValidation: false, // Flag: save to DB for session memory
              context: JSON.stringify({
                wizardStep: currentStep,
                stepName: SCHEMA[`step${currentStep}`].title,
                currentFormData: formData,
              }),
            }),
          });

          removeTypingIndicator();

          if (response.ok) {
            const data = await response.json();
            addChatMessage(
              data.output || data.message || "Sem resposta do agente.",
              "assistant",
            );
            // Refresh sessions list after new message
            debouncedFetchSessions();
          } else {
            addChatMessage(
              "Erro ao consultar o assistente. Tente novamente.",
              "system",
            );
          }
        } catch (error) {
          removeTypingIndicator();
          addChatMessage("Falha de conexão com o assistente.", "system");
        }
      }

      function showTypingIndicator() {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        const existing = chatMessages.querySelector('.chat-msg.typing');
        if (existing) return; // already showing
        const msg = document.createElement("div");
        msg.className = "chat-msg typing";
        msg.innerHTML = '<div class="typing-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>';
        chatMessages.appendChild(msg);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
      }

      function removeTypingIndicator() {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        const typing = chatMessages.querySelector('.chat-msg.typing');
        if (typing) typing.remove();
      }

      function toggleChat() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("chatPanel");
        const btn = document.getElementById("chatToggleBtn");
        panel.classList.toggle("open");
        btn.classList.toggle("active");
      }

      // ============================================
      // SESSION MANAGEMENT
      // ============================================
      let sessionsFetchTimeout = null;

      function debouncedFetchSessions() {
        clearTimeout(sessionsFetchTimeout);
        sessionsFetchTimeout = setTimeout(() => loadSessions(), 2000);
      }

      async function loadSessions() {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_list_sessions');
          if (error) { console.warn('Failed to load sessions:', error.message); return; }
          sessions = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
          renderSessions();
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to load sessions:', e);
        }
      }

      async function loadSessionHistory(sessionId) {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_get_history', { p_session_id: sessionId });
          if (error || !data) return [];
          return data.map(item => {
            if (item.message) {
              return {
                role: item.message.type === 'human' ? 'user' : 'assistant',
                content: stripChatContext(item.message.content || ''),
                timestamp: item.created_at,
              };
            }
            return item;
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to load history:', e);
          return [];
        }
      }

      async function deleteSessionById(sessionId) {
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_delete_session', { p_session_id: sessionId });
          return !error;
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to delete session:', e);
          return false;
        }
      }

      function renderSessions() {
        const list = document.getElementById('sessionsList');
        if (!sessions || sessions.length === 0) {
          list.innerHTML = '<div class="sessions-loading">Nenhuma sessão encontrada</div>';
          return;
        }
        list.innerHTML = sessions.map(s => {
          const isActive = s.session_id === currentSessionId;
          const title = s.titulo || s.session_id?.substring(0, 30) || 'Sessão sem título';

      // ============================================
      // UTILITY FUNCTIONS
      // ============================================
      // ============================================
      // CPF / CNPJ Mask & Validation
      // ============================================
      function maskCpfCnpj(value) {
        let digits = (value || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 14);
        if (digits.length <= 11) {
          // CPF: 000.000.000-00
          digits = digits.slice(0, 11);
          if (digits.length > 9) return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,2})/, '$1.$2.$3-$4');
          if (digits.length > 6) return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2.$3');
          if (digits.length > 3) return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2');
          return digits;
        } else {
          // CNPJ: 00.000.000/0000-00
          if (digits.length > 12) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{4})(\d{1,2})/, '$1.$2.$3/$4-$5');
          if (digits.length > 8) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,4})/, '$1.$2.$3/$4');
          if (digits.length > 5) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2.$3');
          if (digits.length > 2) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2');
          return digits;
        }
      }

      function validateCpf(cpf) {
        const digits = cpf.replace(/\D/g, '');
        if (digits.length !== 11) return false;
        // Reject known invalid sequences
        if (/^(\d)\1{10}$/.test(digits)) return false;
        // First check digit
        let sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * (10 - i);
        let rest = (sum * 10) % 11;
        if (rest === 10) rest = 0;
        if (rest !== parseInt(digits[9])) return false;
        // Second check digit
        sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * (11 - i);
        rest = (sum * 10) % 11;
        if (rest === 10) rest = 0;
        return rest === parseInt(digits[10]);
      }

      function validateCnpj(cnpj) {
        const digits = cnpj.replace(/\D/g, '');
        if (digits.length !== 14) return false;
        if (/^(\d)\1{13}$/.test(digits)) return false;
        const weights1 = [5,4,3,2,9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2];
        const weights2 = [6,5,4,3,2,9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2];
        let sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * weights1[i];
        let rest = sum % 11;
        const d1 = rest < 2 ? 0 : 11 - rest;
        if (parseInt(digits[12]) !== d1) return false;
        sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 13; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * weights2[i];
        rest = sum % 11;
        const d2 = rest < 2 ? 0 : 11 - rest;
        return parseInt(digits[13]) === d2;
      }

      function validateCpfCnpj(value) {
        const digits = (value || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
        if (digits.length === 11) return validateCpf(digits);
        if (digits.length === 14) return validateCnpj(digits);
        return false; // incomplete
      }

      function escapeHtml(text) {
        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.textContent = text || "";
        return div.innerHTML;
      }

      function escapeAttr(text) {
        return (text || "")
          .replace(/&/g, "&")
          .replace(/"/g, """)
          .replace(/'/g, "'")
          .replace(/</g, "<")
          .replace(/>/g, ">");
      }

      // ============================================
      // AUTHENTICATION (Supabase)
      // ============================================
      let currentUser = null;
      let appStarted = false;

      function getAuthHeaders() {
        // Try to get token from authStorage (robust: works in iframes, sandboxed contexts)
        const headers = {};
        try {
          const raw = authStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);
          if (raw) {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
            const token = parsed?.access_token || parsed?.session?.access_token;
            if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
          }
        } catch {}
        // Always include user ID if available
        if (currentUser?.id) {
          headers['x-user-id'] = currentUser.id;
        }
        return headers;
      }

      function generateSessionId() {
        const id = `session-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
        currentSessionId = id;
        return id;
      }

      async function checkAuth() {
        try {
          const { data: { session } } = await sbClient.auth.getSession();
          if (session && session.user) {
            // Verify company_name
            const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
            if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
              await sbClient.auth.signOut();
              showLogin();
              return;
            }
            currentUser = session.user;
            hideLogin();
            startApp();
          } else {
            showLogin();
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Auth check failed:', e);
          showLogin();
        }
      }

      // Listen for auth state changes
      sbClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
        if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' && session?.user) {
          const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
          if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
            sbClient.auth.signOut();
            return;
          }
          currentUser = session.user;
          hideLogin();
          startApp();
        } else if (event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
          currentUser = null;
          showLogin();
        }
      });

      function showLogin() {
        document.getElementById("loginOverlay").style.display = "flex";
        document.getElementById("appContainer").style.display = "none";

      function hideLogin() {
        document.getElementById("loginOverlay").style.display = "none";
        document.getElementById("appContainer").style.display = "flex";
      }

      function getUser() {
        if (currentUser) return currentUser.email || currentUser.id;
        return 'unknown';
      }

      function getUserRole() {
        if (!currentUser) return 'usuario';
        return currentUser.user_metadata?.role || 'usuario';
      }

      /**

      async function setupRepresentanteField() {
        const field = SCHEMA.step1.fields.representante;

        if (isAdmin()) {
          // Admin sees a list of all users
          try {
            const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_list_users');
            if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {
              field.options = data
                .filter(u => u.confirmed)
                .map(u => u.full_name || u.email);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Falha ao carregar lista de representantes:', e);
          }
          field.readOnly = false;
        } else {
          // Regular user: always force their own name, read-only
          const userName = currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || '';
          field.options = [userName];
          field.readOnly = true;

          // Always overwrite with current name (prevents impersonation)
          formData.step1.representante = userName;
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }
