            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <select id="filterStatus" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" style="padding:8px 12px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <option value="">Todos Status</option>
                <option value="submitted">📝 Submetido</option>
                <option value="processing">⏳ Processando</option>
                <option value="completed">✅ Concluído</option>
                <option value="error">❌ Erro</option>
              </select>
              <input type="text" id="filterSearch" onkeyup="applySubmissionFilters()" placeholder="Buscar protocolo, cliente, vendedor..." style="flex:1;min-width:180px;padding:8px 12px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <input type="date" id="filterDateFrom" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" title="Data inicial" style="padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <input type="date" id="filterDateTo" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" title="Data final" style="padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
            </div>
            ` : ''}
            <div id="submissionsContent" style="font-size:13px;">Carregando...</div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) closeSubmissionsPanel(); });

        await loadSubmissions();
      }

      function closeSubmissionsPanel() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById('submissionsOverlay');
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      }

      let allSubmissions = [];

      async function loadSubmissions() {
        const contentEl = document.getElementById('submissionsContent');
        if (!contentEl) return;
        try {
          let query = sbClient
            .from('saorafael_wizard_submission')
            .select('*')
            .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false });

          // RLS handles visibility, but for non-admin we explicitly filter
          if (!isAdmin()) {
            query = query.eq('user_id', currentUser.id);
          }

          const { data, error } = await query;
          if (error) throw error;
          allSubmissions = data || [];
          renderSubmissionsTable(allSubmissions);
        } catch (err) {
          contentEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--color-error);">Erro ao carregar orçamentos: ' + escapeHtml(err.message) + '</p>';
        }
      }

      function applySubmissionFilters() {
        const status = document.getElementById('filterStatus')?.value || '';
        const search = (document.getElementById('filterSearch')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
        const dateFrom = document.getElementById('filterDateFrom')?.value || '';
        const dateTo = document.getElementById('filterDateTo')?.value || '';

        let filtered = [...allSubmissions];

        if (status) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.status === status);
        }
        if (search) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => {
            const fd = s.form_data || {};
            const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
            const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
            const searchStr = [
              s.protocol || '',
              s2.razao_social || '',
              s1.representante || '',
              s1.tipo_produto || '',
              s2.cidade || '',
              s.notes || '',
            ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
            return searchStr.includes(search);
          });
        }
        if (dateFrom) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) >= dateFrom);
        }
        if (dateTo) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) <= dateTo);
        }

        renderSubmissionsTable(filtered);
      }

      function renderSubmissionsTable(submissions) {
        const contentEl = document.getElementById('submissionsContent');
        if (!contentEl) return;

        if (!submissions || submissions.length === 0) {
          contentEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:24px;">Nenhum orçamento encontrado.</p>';
          return;
        }

        const statusBadge = (status) => {
          const map = {
            submitted: { icon: '📝', label: 'Submetido', color: 'var(--color-info)' },
            processing: { icon: '⏳', label: 'Processando', color: 'var(--color-warning)' },
            completed: { icon: '✅', label: 'Concluído', color: 'var(--color-success)' },
            error: { icon: '❌', label: 'Erro', color: 'var(--color-error)' },
          };
          const s = map[status] || { icon: '❓', label: status || 'Desconhecido', color: 'var(--text-secondary)' };
          return `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;background:${s.color}15;color:${s.color};">${s.icon} ${s.label}</span>`;
        };

        const formatDate = (iso) => {
          if (!iso) return '—';
          const d = new Date(iso);
          return d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR') + ' ' + d.toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
        };

        const admin = isAdmin();

        let html = `
          <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
            <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;">
              <thead>
                <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-color);text-align:left;">
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Protocolo</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Data</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Tipo</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Cliente</th>
                  ${admin ? '<th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Vendedor</th>' : ''}
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Status</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);text-align:center;">Ações</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
        `;

        submissions.forEach((sub, idx) => {
          const fd = sub.form_data || {};
          const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
          const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
          const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
          html += `
            <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);${idx % 2 === 0 ? '' : 'background:var(--bg-tertiary);'}" id="sub-row-${sub.id}">
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--color-primary);font-family:monospace;">${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || '—')}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;">${formatDate(sub.submitted_at)}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(s1.tipo_produto || '—')}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(s2.razao_social || '—')}</td>
              ${admin ? `<td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(s1.representante || '—')}</td>` : ''}
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;">${statusBadge(sub.status)}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;">
                <button onclick="toggleSubmissionDetail(${sub.id})" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Detalhes</button>
                ${admin ? `<button onclick="deleteSubmission(${sub.id}, '${escapeAttr(sub.protocol || '')}')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-error);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;margin-left:4px;">Excluir</button>` : ''}
              </td>
            </tr>
            <tr id="sub-detail-${sub.id}" style="display:none;">
              <td colspan="${admin ? 7 : 6}" style="padding:0;">
                <div style="padding:16px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;margin:4px 8px 12px 8px;">
                  ${renderSubmissionDetail(sub)}
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
          `;
        });

        html += '</tbody></table></div>';
        html += `<p style="margin-top:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:right;">${submissions.length} orçamento(s) encontrado(s)</p>`;
        contentEl.innerHTML = html;
      }

      function renderSubmissionDetail(sub) {
        const fd = sub.form_data || {};
        const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
        const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
        const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        const s4 = fd.step4 || {};
        const s5 = fd.step5 || {};
        const s6 = fd.step6 || {};
        const compartimentos = s6.compartimentos || [];
        const sections = [];

        // Helper: only add if has value
        const add = (arr, label, val, suffix) => {
          if (val !== undefined && val !== null && val !== '') {
            arr.push([label, suffix ? val + suffix : val]);
          }
        };

        // ===== Step 1: Dados Comerciais =====
        const comercial = [];
        add(comercial, 'Representante', s1.representante);
        add(comercial, 'Origem Contato', s1.origem_contato);
        add(comercial, 'Tipo Produto', s1.tipo_produto);
        add(comercial, 'Comissão Rep.', s1.comissao_representante, '%');
        add(comercial, 'Comissão Vend.', s1.comissao_vendedor, '%');
        add(comercial, 'Obs. Comerciais', s1.observacoes_comerciais);
        if (comercial.length) sections.push({ title: '💼 Dados Comerciais', items: comercial });

        // ===== Step 2: Cadastro e Logística =====
        const cadastro = [];
        add(cadastro, 'Razão Social', s2.razao_social);
        add(cadastro, 'CNPJ/CPF', s2.cnpj_cpf);
        add(cadastro, 'Inscrição Estadual', s2.inscricao_estadual);
        add(cadastro, 'Endereço Entrega', s2.endereco_entrega);
        add(cadastro, 'Cidade', s2.cidade);
        add(cadastro, 'Estado', s2.estado);
        add(cadastro, 'CEP', s2.cep);
        add(cadastro, 'Local Instalação', s2.local_instalacao_municipio);
        add(cadastro, 'Resumo Técnico', s2.dados_tecnicos_resumo);
        add(cadastro, 'Contato', s2.contato_nome);
        add(cadastro, 'Telefone', s2.contato_telefone);
        add(cadastro, 'E-mail', s2.contato_email);
        add(cadastro, 'Exigência Faturamento', s2.exigencia_faturamento);
        add(cadastro, 'Prazo Pagamento', s2.prazo_pagamento);
        if (cadastro.length) sections.push({ title: '👤 Cadastro & Logística', items: cadastro });

        // ===== Step 3: Especificações Construtivas =====
        const espec = [];
        add(espec, 'Comprimento', s3.comprimento, 'm');
        add(espec, 'Largura', s3.largura, 'm');
        add(espec, 'Altura', s3.altura, 'm');
        if (s3.comprimento && s3.largura) {
          const area = (parseFloat(s3.comprimento) * parseFloat(s3.largura)).toFixed(1);
          const vol = s3.altura ? (parseFloat(s3.comprimento) * parseFloat(s3.largura) * parseFloat(s3.altura)).toFixed(1) : null;
          espec.push(['Área', area + 'm²']);
          if (vol) espec.push(['Volume', vol + 'm³']);
        }
        add(espec, 'Tipo Isolamento', s3.tipo_isolamento);
        add(espec, 'Espessura Painel', s3.espessura_painel, 'mm');
        add(espec, 'Revest. Interno', s3.revestimento_interno);
        add(espec, 'Revest. Externo', s3.revestimento_externo);
        add(espec, 'Cor Revestimento', s3.cor_revestimento);
        add(espec, 'Piso', s3.piso);
        add(espec, 'Iluminação', s3.iluminacao);
        add(espec, 'Qtd Luminárias', s3.qtd_luminarias);
        if (espec.length) sections.push({ title: '📐 Especificações Construtivas', items: espec });

        // ===== Step 4: Acessórios e Fechamentos =====
        const portas = [];
        add(portas, 'Tipo Porta', s4.porta_tipo);
        add(portas, 'Largura Porta', s4.porta_largura, 'mm');
        add(portas, 'Altura Porta', s4.porta_altura, 'mm');
        add(portas, 'Qtd Portas', s4.porta_quantidade);
        add(portas, 'Acessórios Porta', s4.porta_acessorios);
        add(portas, 'Estante', s4.estante_tipo);
        add(portas, 'Qtd Estantes', s4.estante_quantidade);
        add(portas, 'Níveis/Estante', s4.estante_niveis);
        add(portas, 'Cortina PVC', s4.cortina_pvc);
        add(portas, 'Alarme Temp.', s4.alarme);
        add(portas, 'Estrutura Condensadora', s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora);
        if (portas.length) sections.push({ title: '🚪 Acessórios & Fechamentos', items: portas });

        // ===== Step 5: Instalação e Frete =====
        const install = [];
        add(install, 'Horário Entrega', s5.horario_entrega);
        add(install, 'Horário Instalação', s5.horario_instalacao);
        add(install, 'Transporte Vertical', s5.transporte_vertical);
        add(install, 'Andar', s5.andar);
        add(install, 'Fatur. Mão de Obra', s5.faturamento_mao_obra);
        add(install, 'Tipo Frete', s5.tipo_frete);
        add(install, 'Distância', s5.distancia_km, ' km');
        add(install, 'Exigências Local', s5.exigencias_local);
        add(install, 'Obs. Instalação', s5.observacoes_instalacao);
        if (install.length) sections.push({ title: '🚚 Instalação & Frete', items: install });

        // ===== Step 6: Compartimentos =====
        if (compartimentos.length > 0) {
          compartimentos.forEach((comp, idx) => {
            const c = [];
            add(c, 'Nome', comp.nome_compartimento || comp.nome);
            add(c, 'Set Point', comp.temperatura_setpoint || comp.set_point, '°C');
            add(c, 'Produto', comp.produto_armazenado);
            add(c, 'Carga Térmica', comp.carga_termica_kcal, ' Kcal/h');
            add(c, 'Compressor', comp.tipo_compressor);
            add(c, 'Marca', comp.marca_preferencia);
            add(c, 'Evaporador', comp.tipo_evaporador);
            add(c, 'Condensador', comp.tipo_condensador);
            add(c, 'Tensão', comp.tensao);
            add(c, 'Degelo', comp.degelo);
            add(c, 'Fluido', comp.fluido_refrigerante);
            if (c.length) sections.push({ title: `❄️ Compartimento #${idx + 1}${comp.nome_compartimento ? ' — ' + comp.nome_compartimento : ''}`, items: c });
          });
        }

        // ===== Observações gerais =====
        const obs = [];
        if (s1.observacoes_comerciais) obs.push(['Obs. Comerciais', s1.observacoes_comerciais]);
        if (s5.observacoes_instalacao) obs.push(['Obs. Instalação', s5.observacoes_instalacao]);
        if (sub.notes) obs.push(['Notas do Sistema', sub.notes]);
        if (obs.length) sections.push({ title: '📝 Observações', items: obs });

        // ===== RENDER =====
        let html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:12px;">';
        sections.forEach(sec => {
          html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);">`;
          html += `<h4 style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;">${sec.title}</h4>`;
          sec.items.forEach(([label, value]) => {
            const strVal = String(value || '—');
            const isLong = strVal.length > 40;
            if (isLong) {
              html += `<div style="margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;display:block;">${escapeHtml(label)}:</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);display:block;margin-top:2px;word-break:break-word;">${escapeHtml(strVal)}</span></div>`;
            } else {
              html += `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;gap:8px;"><span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;">${escapeHtml(label)}</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);text-align:right;">${escapeHtml(strVal)}</span></div>`;
            }
          });
          html += '</div>';
        });
        html += '</div>';

        // Metadata
        html += `<div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">`;
        html += `<span>ID: ${sub.id}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Protocolo: ${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || '—')}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Session: ${escapeHtml(sub.session_id || '—')}</span>`;
        if (sub.user_id) html += `<span>User: ${escapeHtml(sub.user_id)}</span>`;
        if (sub.processed_at) html += `<span>Processado: ${new Date(sub.processed_at).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Enviado: ${sub.submitted_at ? new Date(sub.submitted_at).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR') + ' ' + new Date(sub.submitted_at).toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }) : '—'}</span>`;
        html += '</div>';

        return html;
      }

      function toggleSubmissionDetail(id) {
        const detailRow = document.getElementById('sub-detail-' + id);
        if (!detailRow) return;
        detailRow.style.display = detailRow.style.display === 'none' ? 'table-row' : 'none';
      }

      async function deleteSubmission(id, protocol) {
        if (!isAdmin()) return;
        if (!confirm(`Excluir orçamento ${protocol || '#' + id}?\nSe o cliente não tiver outros orçamentos, será removido também.\nEsta ação é irreversível.`)) return;
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_delete_submission_smart', { p_submission_id: id });
          if (error) throw error;
          // Remove from local array and re-render
          allSubmissions = allSubmissions.filter(s => s.id !== id);
          renderSubmissionsTable(allSubmissions);
          let msg = `🗑️ Orçamento ${protocol || '#' + id} excluído.`;
          if (data?.client_deleted) {
            msg += ` Cliente "${data.client_name}" também removido (sem outros orçamentos).`;
          }
          addChatMessage(msg, 'system');
        } catch (err) {
          alert('Erro ao excluir: ' + err.message);
        }
      }
      // ==================== END SUBMISSIONS PANEL ====================

      async function loadAdminUsers() {
        const listEl = document.getElementById('adminUsersList');
        if (!listEl) return;
        const myId = currentUser?.id || '';
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_list_users');
          if (error) throw error;
          if (!data || data.length === 0) {
            listEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:13px;">Nenhum usuário encontrado.</p>';
            return;
          }
          listEl.innerHTML = data.map(u => {
            const isSelf = u.id === myId;
            let actionButtons = '';
            if (isSelf) {
              // Self: no actions in admin panel (edit own name via sidebar "Editar Meu Perfil")
              actionButtons = '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;">Use "Editar Meu Perfil" no menu</span>';
            } else {
              // Other users: confirm, change role, delete
              actionButtons += !u.confirmed ? '<button onclick="confirmUser(\'' + u.id + '\')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Confirmar</button>' : '';
              actionButtons += '<button onclick="editUserRole(\'' + u.id + '\',\'' + escapeAttr(u.role) + '\')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Alterar Papel</button>';
              actionButtons += '<button onclick="deleteUser(\'' + u.id + '\',\'' + escapeAttr(u.email) + '\')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-error);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Excluir</button>';
            }
            return `
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;${isSelf ? 'background:rgba(33,150,243,0.05);border-color:rgba(33,150,243,0.2);' : ''}" id="user-row-${u.id}">
              <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(u.full_name || 'Sem nome')}${isSelf ? ' <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--color-info);font-weight:700;">(você)</span>' : ''}</div>
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(u.email)}</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">
                  <span style="display:inline-block;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;${u.role === 'admin' ? 'background:rgba(216,36,68,0.1);color:var(--color-primary);' : 'background:rgba(33,150,243,0.1);color:var(--color-info);'}">${escapeHtml(u.role)}</span>
                  ${u.confirmed ? '<span style="color:var(--color-success);margin-left:6px;">✅</span>' : '<span style="color:var(--color-warning);margin-left:6px;">⏳ Pendente</span>'}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;">
                ${actionButtons}
              </div>
            </div>`;
          }).join('');
        } catch (err) {
          listEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--color-error);font-size:13px;">Erro: ' + escapeHtml(err.message) + '</p>';
        }
      }

      async function confirmUser(userId) {
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_confirm_user', { target_user_id: userId });
          if (error) throw error;
          await loadAdminUsers();
        } catch (err) {
          alert('Erro ao confirmar: ' + err.message);
        }
      }

      // Admin: edit role of another user
      function editUserRole(userId, currentRole) {
        const row = document.getElementById('user-row-' + userId);
        if (!row) return;

        row.innerHTML = `
          <div style="flex:1;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
            <select id="edit-role-${userId}" style="flex:1;padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--color-info);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <option value="usuario" ${currentRole === 'usuario' ? 'selected' : ''}>Usuário</option>
              <option value="visualizador" ${currentRole === 'visualizador' ? 'selected' : ''}>Visualizador</option>
              <option value="admin" ${currentRole === 'admin' ? 'selected' : ''}>Admin</option>
            </select>
            <button onclick="saveRoleEdit('${userId}')" style="padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">Salvar</button>
            <button onclick="loadAdminUsers()" style="padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      // Admin: save role change for another user
      async function saveRoleEdit(userId) {
        const roleEl = document.getElementById('edit-role-' + userId);
        if (!roleEl) return;
        const newRole = roleEl.value;
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_update_user', {
            target_user_id: userId,
            new_role: newRole,
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          await loadAdminUsers();
        } catch (err) {
          alert('Erro ao atualizar papel: ' + err.message);
        }
      }

      // Any user: edit own profile (name)
      function showEditProfilePanel() {
        const currentName = currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || '';
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'profileOverlay';
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10000;';
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:420px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <h2 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Editar Meu Perfil</h2>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('profileOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">E-mail: ${escapeHtml(currentUser?.email || '')}</div>
            <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);display:block;margin-bottom:6px;">Nome completo</label>
            <input type="text" id="profileNameInput" value="${escapeAttr(currentName)}" placeholder="Seu nome" style="width:100%;padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:16px;">
            <div id="profileMsg" style="margin-bottom:10px;font-size:12px;display:none;"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('profileOverlay').remove()" style="padding:10px 18px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
              <button onclick="saveOwnName()" style="padding:10px 18px;background:var(--color-primary);color:white;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Salvar</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); });
        document.getElementById('profileNameInput').focus();
      }

      async function saveOwnName() {
        const nameEl = document.getElementById('profileNameInput');
        const msgEl = document.getElementById('profileMsg');
        if (!nameEl) return;
        const newName = nameEl.value.trim();
        if (!newName) {
          msgEl.style.display = 'block';
          msgEl.style.color = 'var(--color-error)';
          msgEl.textContent = 'O nome não pode ser vazio.';
          return;
        }
        try {
          // Use auth.updateUser to update metadata AND refresh the session token
          // This ensures the name persists after page reload
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.auth.updateUser({
            data: { full_name: newName }
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          // Update currentUser with the refreshed session data
          if (data?.user) {
            currentUser = data.user;
          } else {
            if (currentUser.user_metadata) currentUser.user_metadata.full_name = newName;
          }
          updateSidebarUser();
          // Refresh representante field with new name
          await setupRepresentanteField();
          renderCurrentStep();
          msgEl.style.display = 'block';
          msgEl.style.color = 'var(--color-success)';
          msgEl.textContent = '✅ Nome atualizado com sucesso!';
          setTimeout(() => {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('profileOverlay');
            if (overlay) overlay.remove();
          }, 1200);
        } catch (err) {
          msgEl.style.display = 'block';
          msgEl.style.color = 'var(--color-error)';
          msgEl.textContent = '❌ ' + (err.message || 'Erro ao salvar');
        }
      }

      async function deleteUser(userId, email) {
        if (userId === (currentUser?.id || '')) {
          alert('Você não pode excluir a si mesmo.');
          return;
        }
        if (!confirm('Excluir o usuário ' + email + '?')) return;
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_delete_user', { target_user_id: userId });
          if (error) throw error;
          await loadAdminUsers();
        } catch (err) {
          alert('Erro ao excluir: ' + err.message);
        }
      }

      // Init
      if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      initValidationTracker();
      marked.setOptions({
        breaks: true,
        gfm: true,
        highlight: function (code, lang) {
          try {
            return hljs.highlightAuto(code).value;
          } catch (e) {
            return code;
          }
        },
      });
      checkAuth();
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
